'''''Hawkbat''''' was a [[Supply ship/Legends|supply ship]] in the [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]].

In [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was commanded by [[Bock Nabyl]]. Shortly before the [[Battle of Talasea]], the ship was ordered to transport supplies to [[Ession Strike|''Night Caller'']], but had to do so under quarantine procedures due to an outbreak of [[Bunkurd Sewer Disorder]] contracted by crewmembers on leave on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Storinal]]. The captain and crew apparently never learned that this outbreak was deliberately caused by [[Wraith Squadron]], who were trying to avoid direct contact with personnel of Zsinj's empire.

The class of the ''Hawkbat'' remains unknown, but it was large enough to carry at least two [[Shuttle/Legends|shuttles]], the ''[[Hawkbat's Perch]]'' and ''[[Hawkbat's Vigil]]''.
